chapter_title.en: Chapter on Aqiqah, Tahnik, Naming, Kunyah, Shaving the newborn's Head, Piercing the Ears, and Circumcision

text: 4730 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "يَا فَاطِمَةُ اُثْقُبِي أُذُنَيِ اَلْحَسَنِ وَ اَلْحُسَيْنِ خِلاَفاً لِلْيَهُودِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4730 - In the narration of Al-Sakooni, the Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "O Fatimah, pierce the ears of Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn in opposition to the Jews."
